title: WV Labor Market Map
description: Interactive county-level map of West Virginia labor market indicators. Explore unemployment rates, wages, and employment trends by county.
note: Add the URL or iframe src once hosted. Drop thumbnail into assets/gallery/.

title: Generative Lines
description: A p5.js sketch that draws flowing, recursive line patterns based on mouse movement and randomness.
note: Paste your p5.js Editor share URL into the 'url' field, or set embed:true with an iframe URL.
